title: You Understand
story: [Meridian-7 Log #024] rEx sent a navigation document using a link format similar to Markdown — [description](coordinates). These links point to different modules of rEx's space station. You need to parse every link to plan Meridian-7's docking path. rEx says: "You understand."
hints: [Hint] text does not start with ! (to exclude image syntax)
[Hint] url can contain various characters but no parentheses
promptHints: Tell the AI what characters text and url can each contain

feedback.onPass: [Pattern Accepted] You understand. Markdown links — seemingly simple, yet elegant.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Almost there. The nesting of square brackets and parentheses requires precise matching.
feedback.onPerfect: [Decryption Success] Perfect understanding. rEx says: "You are ready."
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual completion. You no longer need AI's help.
